caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" and "TALK" written in gold lettering, and a gold chain sits in a studio setting. He wears headphones and sits behind a desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white banner features the words "URBAN HUSTLE" and five stars. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and a blue banner that says "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the initial moments, the man looks forward with a neutral expression while holding a silver disc in his hands. As the scene progresses, he turns his head to the right and smiles broadly, continuing to hold the disc. A small black box with "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the desk, along with a black mug featuring the same "BOSS TALK 101" logo.
